executive_summary.summary: The website https://linear.app/ has significant performance issues, some accessibility concerns, and minor security issues. The SEO score is perfect.

top_issues.title: Optimize Images
top_issues.description: Convert large assets to WebP and implement responsive image sizing.
top_issues.recommendation: Use a image optimization tool to compress and convert images to WebP.

top_issues.impact: Convert large assets to WebP and implement responsive image sizing.

performance.summary: The page has significant performance issues, with a low score of 28. The main problems are a large DOM size, slow Largest Contentful Paint, and high Total Blocking Time.

findings.evidence: Largest Contentful Paint: 20.7 s (mobile), 7.0 s (desktop); budget 2.5 s
findings.impact: Slow page loading can lead to a high bounce rate and negatively impact user experience.
findings.recommendation: Optimize images, reduce DOM size, and improve server response time to decrease Largest Contentful Paint.

findings.evidence: Total Blocking Time: 4,381 ms (mobile), 900 ms (desktop)
findings.impact: High Total Blocking Time can cause slow page responsiveness and affect user interaction.
findings.recommendation: Minify and compress CSS and JavaScript files, and consider using a CDN to reduce blocking time.

findings.evidence: DOM size: 3,872 elements (mobile), 3,871 elements (desktop)
findings.impact: A large DOM size can increase the duration of style calculations and layout reflows, impacting page responsiveness.
findings.recommendation: Optimize DOM size by reducing unnecessary elements, using a virtual DOM, or implementing lazy loading.

findings.evidence: Estimated savings: 242 KiB (mobile), 458 KiB (desktop)
findings.impact: Inefficient cache lifetimes can lead to slower page loads and increased network activity.
findings.recommendation: Implement efficient cache lifetimes by setting appropriate cache headers and using a caching layer.

accessibility.summary: Automated tooling detects roughly a third of WCAG failures; manual review is required for the categories listed in `manual_review_required`. The site scored 86% on mobile and 88% on desktop, indicating some accessibility issues.

findings.evidence: The site uses ARIA attributes that match their roles, with no mismatches detected.
findings.impact: Screen readers and other assistive technologies can accurately interpret the site's content.
findings.recommendation: Continue to ensure ARIA attributes are used correctly to maintain accessibility.

findings.evidence: The site uses ARIA attributes as specified for the element's role, with no conditional attribute issues detected.
findings.impact: The site's content is more accessible to users of assistive technologies.
findings.recommendation: Maintain the correct use of ARIA attributes to ensure continued accessibility.

findings.evidence: No deprecated ARIA roles were used on the site.
findings.impact: The site's content is more compatible with current assistive technologies.
findings.recommendation: Continue to avoid using deprecated ARIA roles to ensure accessibility.

findings.evidence: The site does not have `[aria-hidden="true"]` set on the document `<body>`.
findings.impact: Assistive technologies can consistently interpret the site's content.
findings.recommendation: Maintain this practice to ensure accessibility.

findings.evidence: The site does not have focusable descendents within `[aria-hidden="true"]` elements.
findings.impact: Interactive elements are available to users of assistive technologies.
findings.recommendation: Continue to ensure that focusable elements are not hidden from assistive technologies.

seo.summary: The website has a perfect SEO score, with all audits passing without issue. No adjustments were made to the score.

findings.evidence: The page is not blocked from indexing, with a score of 1 in the 'is-crawlable' audit.
findings.impact: Search engines can crawl and index the page, improving its visibility in search results.
findings.recommendation: No action is required, as the page is already crawlable.

findings.evidence: The page has a valid canonical link, with a score of 1 in the 'canonical' audit.
findings.impact: Search engines can understand the preferred version of the page, reducing duplicate content issues.
findings.recommendation: No action is required, as the page already has a valid canonical link.

findings.evidence: The page has a meta description, with a score of 1 in the 'meta-description' audit.
findings.impact: Search engines can display a descriptive summary of the page in search results, improving click-through rates.
findings.recommendation: No action is required, as the page already has a meta description.

findings.evidence: The robots.txt file is valid, with a score of 1 in the 'robots-txt' audit.
findings.impact: Search engines can understand the crawl directives, ensuring that the page is crawled and indexed correctly.
findings.recommendation: No action is required, as the robots.txt file is already valid.

findings.evidence: The sitemap.xml file is present and valid, with a status code of 200.
findings.impact: Search engines can discover and crawl the pages listed in the sitemap, improving the website's visibility.
findings.recommendation: No action is required, as the sitemap.xml file is already present and valid.

security.summary: The site has a good security posture, with some minor issues to address.

findings.evidence: TLS protocol version is TLSv1.3
findings.impact: Using the latest TLS protocol version ensures the site is protected against known vulnerabilities.
findings.recommendation: Continue to use the latest TLS protocol version to maintain a high level of security.

findings.evidence: Content Security Policy (CSP) is present and configured: default-src 'self' https://static.linear.app https://static.linear.dev; ...
findings.impact: A well-configured CSP helps prevent cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks.
findings.recommendation: Review and refine the CSP configuration to ensure it is effective and up-to-date.

findings.evidence: Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is present and configured: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains
findings.impact: HSTS helps prevent man-in-the-middle attacks by ensuring the site is only accessed over HTTPS.
findings.recommendation: Consider increasing the max-age value to a higher value, such as 31536000, to provide longer-term protection.

findings.evidence: X-Content-Type-Options is present and configured: nosniff
findings.impact: This header helps prevent MIME-sniffing attacks.
findings.recommendation: Continue to use this header to maintain protection against MIME-sniffing attacks.

findings.evidence: Referrer-Policy is present and configured: same-origin
findings.impact: This header helps control the referrer information sent with requests.
findings.recommendation: Review and refine the Referrer-Policy configuration to ensure it meets the site's needs.

findings.evidence: Permissions-Policy is missing
findings.impact: This header helps control the features and APIs that can be used by the site.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding a Permissions-Policy header to control the features and APIs used by the site.

findings.evidence: Robots.txt contains a disallow directive for /api/
findings.impact: This directive may not be effective in preventing access to the API.
findings.recommendation: Consider using a more robust method to protect the API, such as authentication or rate limiting.

findings.evidence: Sitemap.xml contains a list of URLs, including https://linear.app/about and https://linear.app/contact
findings.impact: This information may be useful to an attacker.
findings.recommendation: Consider removing or limiting the information available in the sitemap.xml file.

findings.evidence: Certificate notAfter date is Aug 8 22:01:09 2026 GMT
findings.impact: The certificate will expire soon, which may cause issues with the site's availability.
findings.recommendation: Renew the certificate before it expires to maintain the site's availability.
